title: Cast with WIDTH ignored forces wrong bit width conversion in version 4.100
body:
verilog like this:
```verilog
module twocounter(
   input clk1,
   output wire out2
);
typedef logic [9:0] apb_offset_t;
typedef enum apb_offset_t {
  APB_OFFSET_DEBUG_DBGWVR0_EL1  = apb_offset_t'('h004 >> 2),
  APB_OFFSET_DEBUG_DBGWVR0_EL1_H1  = apb_offset_t'('h804 >> 2),
  APB_OFFSET_DEBUG_DBGWCR0_EL1  = apb_offset_t'('h808 >> 2)
} apb_offset_debug_enum;

  apb_offset_t apb_wvr_offset_hi;
  assign apb_wvr_offset_hi = apb_offset_t'(APB_OFFSET_DEBUG_DBGWVR0_EL1_H1 + apb_offset_t'('h4)  );

endmodule
```
compile log like this:
```
%Error: twocounter.v:8:3: Overlapping enumeration value: 'APB_OFFSET_DEBUG_DBGWVR0_EL1_H1'
                        : ... In instance twocounter
    8 |   APB_OFFSET_DEBUG_DBGWVR0_EL1_H1  = apb_offset_t'('h804 >> 2),
      |   ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
        twocounter.v:7:3: ... Location of original declaration
    7 |   APB_OFFSET_DEBUG_DBGWVR0_EL1  = apb_offset_t'('h004 >> 2),
      |   ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
```
by the way,4.038 compile ok
